identity_baseline: High-ranking Martian ruler and Jeddak of Zodanga.
stable_visual_summary: Than Kosis is an elder male Martian ruler possessing a powerful build and a commanding, authoritative presence. He is defined by his high-ranking status as the Jeddak of Zodanga, typically appearing in regal Zodangan regalia and noble attire that signifies his command over his people.

relationship_notes: Commands massive manhunts and high-ranking nobility.
